title: Pixar Disney Cultural Figures Bathroom Mirror Selfie AI
sourceTitle: Pixar Disney Cultural Figures Bathroom Mirror Selfie AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed 3D CGI Pixar/Disney-style bathroom mirror selfie featuring a samurai warrior, a kabuki performer, and a geisha-inspired cultural hostess from Japan in joyful chaotic close-up. Subject: a samurai warrior, a kabuki performer, and a geisha-inspired cultural hostess squeeze together in a fun bathroom mirror selfie, with adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure holding a large vintage camera up to the mirror while all figures keep faithful traditional attire, cultural identity, signature outfits, and iconic expressions. Scene: Japanese bathhouse-inspired bathroom with lanterns, wood details, Mount Fuji tile easter egg, and folded towels fills the bathroom with traditional decorations, thematic props, subtle landmark easter eggs, realistic toothpaste smears, and water droplets on the mirror. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved pixar disney cultural figures bathroom mirror selfie source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Disney/Pixar stylized 3D CGI render with expressive eyes, stylized facial proportions, faithful cultural costume detail, warm Pixar color grade, 4K quality, and playful social-selfie energy. Color Palette: Warm bathroom ambers, culturally specific costume colors, glossy mirror whites, camera-flash highlights, soft skin tones, and saturated Pixar-style accents. Lighting: Warm soft bathroom ambiance plus bright vintage-camera flash, reflected highlights on water droplets, soft 3D character shadows, and cheerful close-range illumination. Typography: JAPAN heart supplies the swappable mirror text detail for this template. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
